code:
/**
 * products.js
 *
 * Product catalogue data.
 * To add a product: copy any object below, change the fields, increment the id.
 * To remove a product: delete its object from the array.
 *
 * category must be one of: 'phones' | 'laptops' | 'accessories'
 * badge must be one of: 'Hot' | 'Popular' | 'New' | 'UK Used' | 'Gaming'
 */

/** @type {import('../types').Product[]} */
const products = [
// ── PHONES ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
{
  id: 1,
  category: 'phones',
  name: 'iPhone 15 Pro Max',
  model: '256GB · Natural Titanium',
  price: '₦850,000',
  badge: 'Hot',
  description: 'Brand new, sealed. A17 Pro chip, titanium frame, 48MP camera system.',
  emoji: '📱'
}, {
  id: 2,
  category: 'phones',
  name: 'Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra',
  model: '256GB · Phantom Black',
  price: '₦780,000',
  badge: 'Popular',
  description: 'New. 200MP camera, built-in S Pen, 5000mAh battery.',
  emoji: '📱'
}, {
  id: 3,
  category: 'phones',
  name: 'iPhone 14 Pro',
  model: '128GB · Deep Purple',
  price: '₦480,000',
  badge: 'UK Used',
  description: 'Grade A UK used. Dynamic Island, 48MP, excellent condition.',
  emoji: '📱'
}, {
  id: 4,
  category: 'phones',
  name: 'Tecno Phantom X2 Pro',
  model: '256GB · Mars Orange',
  price: '₦185,000',
  badge: 'New',
  description: 'Brand new. Retractable portrait lens, 5160mAh, 45W charging.',
  emoji: '📱'
},
// ── LAPTOPS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
{
  id: 5,
  category: 'laptops',
  name: 'MacBook Air M2',
  model: '8GB RAM · 256GB SSD',
  price: '₦620,000',
  badge: 'Popular',
  description: 'UK used, Grade A. Fanless design, all-day battery, blazing fast.',
  emoji: '💻'
}, {
  id: 6,
  category: 'laptops',
  name: 'Dell XPS 15',
  model: '16GB RAM · 512GB SSD',
  price: '₦520,000',
  badge: 'UK Used',
  description: 'Intel i7 12th Gen. OLED display. Perfect for creatives and professionals.',
  emoji: '💻'
}, {
  id: 7,
  category: 'laptops',
  name: 'ASUS ROG Strix G15',
  model: '16GB RAM · 512GB SSD',
  price: '₦480,000',
  badge: 'Gaming',
  description: 'RTX 3060, 144Hz display. Dominates every game you throw at it.',
  emoji: '💻'
}, {
  id: 8,
  category: 'laptops',
  name: 'HP EliteBook 840 G9',
  model: '16GB RAM · 256GB SSD',
  price: '₦280,000',
  badge: 'UK Used',
  description: 'Intel i5 12th Gen. Business grade, lightweight, fast.',
  emoji: '💻'
},
// ── ACCESSORIES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
{
  id: 9,
  category: 'accessories',
  name: 'AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)',
  model: 'USB-C · White',
  price: '₦85,000',
  badge: 'New',
  description: 'Active noise cancellation, spatial audio, 30hr total battery.',
  emoji: '🎧'
}, {
  id: 10,
  category: 'accessories',
  name: 'Samsung 65W Super Fast Charger',
  model: 'USB-C PD',
  price: '₦12,000',
  badge: 'New',
  description: 'Official Samsung. Compatible with S and A series plus laptops.',
  emoji: '🔌'
}, {
  id: 11,
  category: 'accessories',
  name: 'Apple MagSafe Charger',
  model: '15W · 1m Cable',
  price: '₦22,000',
  badge: 'New',
  description: 'Original Apple. Works with iPhone 12 and above.',
  emoji: '🔌'
}, {
  id: 12,
  category: 'accessories',
  name: 'JBL Flip 6',
  model: 'Black · Waterproof',
  price: '₦48,000',
  badge: 'New',
  description: 'IP67 waterproof, 12hr playtime, powerful JBL bass.',
  emoji: '🔊'
}];
export default products;

sourcesContent:
/**
 * products.js
 *
 * Product catalogue data.
 * To add a product: copy any object below, change the fields, increment the id.
 * To remove a product: delete its object from the array.
 *
 * category must be one of: 'phones' | 'laptops' | 'accessories'
 * badge must be one of: 'Hot' | 'Popular' | 'New' | 'UK Used' | 'Gaming'
 */

/** @type {import('../types').Product[]} */
const products = [
  // ── PHONES ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 1,
    category: 'phones',
    name: 'iPhone 15 Pro Max',
    model: '256GB · Natural Titanium',
    price: '₦850,000',
    badge: 'Hot',
    description: 'Brand new, sealed. A17 Pro chip, titanium frame, 48MP camera system.',
    emoji: '📱',
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    category: 'phones',
    name: 'Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra',
    model: '256GB · Phantom Black',
    price: '₦780,000',
    badge: 'Popular',
    description: 'New. 200MP camera, built-in S Pen, 5000mAh battery.',
    emoji: '📱',
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    category: 'phones',
    name: 'iPhone 14 Pro',
    model: '128GB · Deep Purple',
    price: '₦480,000',
    badge: 'UK Used',
    description: 'Grade A UK used. Dynamic Island, 48MP, excellent condition.',
    emoji: '📱',
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    category: 'phones',
    name: 'Tecno Phantom X2 Pro',
    model: '256GB · Mars Orange',
    price: '₦185,000',
    badge: 'New',
    description: 'Brand new. Retractable portrait lens, 5160mAh, 45W charging.',
    emoji: '📱',
  },

  // ── LAPTOPS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 5,
    category: 'laptops',
    name: 'MacBook Air M2',
    model: '8GB RAM · 256GB SSD',
    price: '₦620,000',
    badge: 'Popular',
    description: 'UK used, Grade A. Fanless design, all-day battery, blazing fast.',
    emoji: '💻',
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    category: 'laptops',
    name: 'Dell XPS 15',
    model: '16GB RAM · 512GB SSD',
    price: '₦520,000',
    badge: 'UK Used',
    description: 'Intel i7 12th Gen. OLED display. Perfect for creatives and professionals.',
    emoji: '💻',
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    category: 'laptops',
    name: 'ASUS ROG Strix G15',
    model: '16GB RAM · 512GB SSD',
    price: '₦480,000',
    badge: 'Gaming',
    description: 'RTX 3060, 144Hz display. Dominates every game you throw at it.',
    emoji: '💻',
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    category: 'laptops',
    name: 'HP EliteBook 840 G9',
    model: '16GB RAM · 256GB SSD',
    price: '₦280,000',
    badge: 'UK Used',
    description: 'Intel i5 12th Gen. Business grade, lightweight, fast.',
    emoji: '💻',
  },

  // ── ACCESSORIES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 9,
    category: 'accessories',
    name: 'AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)',
    model: 'USB-C · White',
    price: '₦85,000',
    badge: 'New',
    description: 'Active noise cancellation, spatial audio, 30hr total battery.',
    emoji: '🎧',
  },
  {
    id: 10,
    category: 'accessories',
    name: 'Samsung 65W Super Fast Charger',
    model: 'USB-C PD',
    price: '₦12,000',
    badge: 'New',
    description: 'Official Samsung. Compatible with S and A series plus laptops.',
    emoji: '🔌',
  },
  {
    id: 11,
    category: 'accessories',
    name: 'Apple MagSafe Charger',
    model: '15W · 1m Cable',
    price: '₦22,000',
    badge: 'New',
    description: 'Original Apple. Works with iPhone 12 and above.',
    emoji: '🔌',
  },
  {
    id: 12,
    category: 'accessories',
    name: 'JBL Flip 6',
    model: 'Black · Waterproof',
    price: '₦48,000',
    badge: 'New',
    description: 'IP67 waterproof, 12hr playtime, powerful JBL bass.',
    emoji: '🔊',
  },
];

export default products;
